title: This Website is for My Mom
content:
🌟 English / 英文 🌟

This website is dedicated to my mom.

Mom, this is for you. I built this website to share my journey with you and to show you what I've been learning.

Thank you for always supporting me in my education and career. Thank you for believing in me when I was learning English and studying to become a Health Care Aide. Thank you for encouraging me to pursue computer programming.

This website represents all the skills I've learned - from my language learning goals to my computer programming journey. Every blog post, every line of code, every accomplishment - I share them here so you can see my progress.

Building this modern React website and seeing it live on the internet is a milestone I want to celebrate with you. It shows how far I've come from my early days of learning English and basic computer skills.

I hope this makes you proud.

With love,
Junwei

🌟 中文 / Chinese 🌟

这个网站是献给我的妈妈的。

妈妈，这是为您做的。我建立这个网站是为了与您分享我的学习历程，让您看到我学到的东西。

感谢您一直以来对我的教育和职业的支持。感谢您在我学习英语时相信我，感谢您支持我成为医疗护理助理。感谢您鼓励我学习计算机编程。

这个网站代表了我学到的所有技能——从我的语言学习目标到我的计算机编程之路。每一篇博客文章，每一行代码，每一个成就——我都在这里分享，让您可以看到我的进步。

建立这个现代化的React网站并看到它在互联网上上线，是我想与您一起庆祝的一个里程碑。这显示了我从早期学习英语和基本计算机技能到现在走了多远。

我希望这让您感到骄傲。

爱您的，
军伟
excerpt: This website is dedicated to my mom. Thank you for always supporting me in my education and career.

title: My Modern React Website is Live!
content:
March 30, 2026

I'm excited to announce that my modern React website is now live and it is completely free!

I successfully converted my old WordPress blog to a modern React application. The new site is faster, cleaner, and easier to maintain.

You can visit it at: https://takasak-blog.netlify.app/

The best part? It's hosted for free on Netlify with automatic deployments from GitHub. Every time I update my code, the site automatically rebuilds and deploys!

This journey has taught me so much about modern web development, React, and deployment workflows. I'm proud of what I've accomplished today.
excerpt: March 30, 2026. My modern React website is now live and it is completely free! Successfully converted from WordPress to React.

title: My goal for Computer programming
content:
I am going to finish my Associate Degree in University of the People. First , my plan is to go through the CS 2205 Web Programming 1 in the term 1 , 2018 .

Second, I will take two courses in the coming term 2.

At Last, I plan to find some tutor for my difficult course.

Set up a History book website which attach with my paypal business account.

update some daily feature from my everyday reading

Use computer skill to build a network with wordpress.

title: My Goal for language learning
content:
1.

My goal for learning english:

My goal is to read more in English. I want to study pharmacy technician program. I need to finish my grade 12 English class.

2.

What I will do to to help my achieve my goal:

I have to finish these tasks.

I read two 250 words articles in the textbook every day.

I write an essay of 200 words every day.

I read a 250 words article on the msn.ca website.

 

Which of the above steps will challenge you the most?

 

There is a lot of specialised vocabulary in the health area ,and my task 3 will help me with achieve this goal
excerpt: My goal for learning english: My goal is to read more in English. I want to study pharmacy technician program.  I need to finish my grade 12 English class.

title: Hello world!
content:
Welcome to WordPress.com. After you read this, you should delete and write your own post, with a new title above. Or hit Add New on the left (of the admin dashboard) to start a fresh post.

Here are some suggestions for your first post.

  1. You can find new ideas for what to blog about by reading the Daily Post.
  2. Add PressThis to your browser. It creates a new blog post for you about any interesting page you read on the web.
  3. Make some changes to this page, and then hit preview on the right. You can alway preview any post or edit you before you share it to the world.
excerpt: Welcome to WordPress.com. After you read this, you should delete and write your own post, with a new title above. Or hit Add New on the left (of the admin dashboard) to start a fresh post.
